text.title: Fine-tuning OpenAI — Production Pipeline Core Rules

rule.statement: Job submission MUST set n_epochs, batch_size, learning_rate_multiplier explicitly; never rely on defaults silently.
rule.rationale: OpenAI default heuristics change; explicit values give reproducibility.

rule.statement: Status polling MUST use exponential backoff (start 30s, cap 5 min).
rule.rationale: Tight polling burns quota and hits rate limits.

rule.statement: Promotion MUST be gated by eval on the held-out set; eval set MUST not have been in training.
rule.rationale: In-training eval over-reports; held-out catches it.

rule.statement: Model registry MUST pin the fine-tuned model ID + base_model + dataset_hash + eval_score.
rule.rationale: Without a registry, prod traffic cannot pin / roll back.

rule.statement: Pipeline MUST support rollback to previous registry entry on eval regression > 5pp.
rule.rationale: Silent regressions destroy trust; explicit rollback recovers.

rule.statement: Each stage MUST be idempotent and resumable (re-running with same inputs is a no-op or recovers from last step).
rule.rationale: Long-running ft jobs interact with flaky networks; resumability prevents waste.
